author: Angelo
msg:
Try this:

1. Check that your license is fully active and properly linked.

2. Confirm you’re logged into the exact same Unity account on both the app and rewards dashboard.

3. Remove battery saver/background restrictions and keep the phone online with stable internet.

4. Delete and reinstall the app to check if this will fix your issue plus, try restarting your device then check again.

5. If all of that is correct, wait for the next verification/reward cycle, because uptime alone may not trigger rewards immediately.

* (This is an AI generated response I got from ChatGPT with a few changes/modifications I made myself before posting it, hope it helps) 🙏😊
